description: Trail geometry generation in the Room Editor should produce strictly orthogonal corridors (axis-aligned segments only, with 90° turns and no curved interpolation). Touch the trail creation path used by RoomEditor::create_trail_from_footer and trail map-manifest normalization/runtime consumers (ENGINE/editor/devtools/room_editor.hpp, ENGINE/runtime/core/manifest/map_manifest_normalizer.cpp, ENGINE/runtime/core/game_runtime_context.cpp). Implementation direction: represent each trail as a centerline polyline constrained to cardinal directions (up/down/left/right), then extrude by trail width to build one clean perimeter polygon with no self-intersections or tangled interior edges. Constraints/cleanup: preserve existing trail serialization keys in trails_data, allow unlimited corner count, and validate output winding/edge ordering so spawn overlap checks and Area::contains_point remain stable.

Fix the crash when changing map background color from the Room Editor Misc Options panel, and make the background color preview update live while dragging/editing the control. Investigate RoomEditor/OtherSettingsAndControls event wiring and map render state propagation (ENGINE/editor/devtools/other_settings_and_controls.cpp, ENGINE/editor/devtools/room_editor.hpp, ENGINE/runtime/utils/utils/area.hpp). Implementation direction: harden the map-color setter path with null/state guards and immediate repaint signaling so every color delta updates the active room background in-frame. Constraints/cleanup: keep current map-manifest field names/default behavior, avoid deferred-only apply behavior, and ensure no duplicate listeners trigger stale state writes.

Correct floor-texture crop/sink clipping so crop alignment is parallel to the world ground plane (screen bottom/X-axis/horizon), not skewed by tilt orientation. Investigate the crop application path in room rendering and asset texture placement utilities (ENGINE/runtime/assets/asset/asset_info.cpp, ENGINE/runtime/assets/asset/Asset.hpp, ENGINE/runtime/utils/utils/AnchorPointResolver.cpp). Implementation direction: compute crop bounds in a consistent ground-parallel basis before projection, then apply that basis uniformly across tiles so visual cut lines remain horizontal/axis-consistent. Constraints/cleanup: preserve existing crop parameter schema, avoid changing non-floor asset cropping, and remove any per-tile transform branch that introduces rotational drift.

Custom controller authoring cleanup in the Animation Editor: consolidate reusable controller helpers into a single shared module and make generated controllers derive from the same base behavior contract used at runtime. Relevant code paths include controller scaffolding/service and runtime dispatch (ENGINE/editor/devtools/asset_editor/animation_editor_window/CustomControllerService.cpp, ENGINE/runtime/animation/controllers/shared/, and default custom-controller dispatch classes). Implementation direction: define one canonical base interface/class with lifecycle/update hooks plus utility accessors, move helper APIs (including custom_asset_controller helpers) under ENGINE/runtime/animation/controllers/shared, and ensure DefaultCustomController implements and dispatches every documented default hook. Constraints/cleanup: keep backward compatibility for existing metadata controller keys, remove duplicate helper include paths, and update template generation so new controllers are wired without manual edits.

Asset Info Stack anchor depth editing in RoomEditor should use deterministic per-tick world units: mouse-wheel changes must adjust anchor depth_offset by fixed 1-pixel world-depth steps (not percent/fractional increments). Relevant systems: RoomEditor anchor edit input handling/state, Anchor tools panel numeric bindings, and asset metadata persistence (ENGINE/editor/devtools/room_editor.hpp, ENGINE/editor/devtools/room_anchor_tools_panel.hpp, ENGINE/runtime/assets/asset/asset_info.cpp). Implementation direction: quantize wheel edits to integer depth units, push updates immediately to UI numeric fields, and write/read the same stabilized depth_offset values in animation payloads. Constraints/cleanup: preserve existing scroll direction/sign semantics, keep non-depth anchor snapping rules unchanged, and prevent cumulative floating-point drift after repeated wheel input.
